name: Chaos Falcon Feather
description:
Activate Cast a Spell

When used as catalysts, chaos falcon feathers lend flexibility to spells that deal with elemental energy. For the duration of a catalyzed spell, you can Sustain the Spell on an adjacent target, touching them and changing the type of energy to which they have resistance. This reduces the remaining duration of the spell by 1 minute; if the spell has less than a minute remaining, it reduces the duration to 1 round.
